positive: A vibrant, maximalist pattern illustration of tropical flora and fauna (parrots, hibiscus, toucans) arranged in a repeating border design. Style: Alphonse Mucha inspired, detailed etching, jewel tones, bohemian aesthetic, perfect repeating tile pattern.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, simple, monochrome, gradient
